geographic_restrictions: No explicit geographic restrictions mentioned; likely open to life science entrepreneurs broadly.
project_area: Life sciences, specifically focusing on seed and angel financing for life science companies.
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; open to entrepreneurs of all ages and backgrounds.
eligibility_summary: Open to life science entrepreneurs seeking seed or angel financing, particularly those in the early stages of launching startups. Focus on translating ideas and data into commercial products for human health.
